statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Existing AppCompat policy review record
links.summary: The policy half of the composite is already documented as review-required.

links.title: Application Experience task review record
links.summary: The task half of the composite is tracked separately and also remains review-required.

links.title: Current privacy provider composite
links.summary: The provider exposes privacy.disable-application-compatibility as a composite of the policy and task sub-tweaks.
